articles.title: Crypto.com To Delist USDT in Canada Due To Regulatory Pressures
articles.description: USDT is the world's most important stablecoin, but not in Canada. Crypto.com had to delist the token to comply with regulations.

articles.title: Cardano Up 30% Since December As 28 New Whales Hold At least 1 Million ADA
articles.description: Though Cardano (ADA) has been gaining traction for a while, the recent accumulated momentum has garnered active buys as data shows the rising accumulation of ADA. ADA’s movement to the upside since last December totaled 30%, as new whales have been reported to be holding at least 1 million ADA tokens in these past few weeks amid the mini bull run.
